hook.summary: A 3D cheerleader dances in a stadium as a massive jackpot counter climbs and gold coins rain down.
hook.visual_action: A cheerleader performs a dance routine on a football field with fireworks and falling coins.

scene_flow: A 3D cheerleader dances on a football field while a 'COLOSSAL JACKPOT' counter ticks up.
Gold coins rain down over the character as fireworks burst in the background.
The headline shifts to 'Win Big This Super Bowl!' while the dance continues.
The 'PLAY NOW' button is prominently displayed at the bottom of the screen throughout.
audience_proxy: Adult mobile gamers who enjoy casino-style games and sports-themed events.
